summary: Integral backend test of Lluvia App Studio v10. 26/26 pytest cases passing on the public preview URL covering auth+rate-limit, promos CRUD, proposals workflow (create/approve/reject end-to-end including promo_create that materializes a promo), PayPal packs (promo discount + price_usd_original + promo_label), PayPal webhook signature 403, Telegram unified (/agente menu with 8 agents, /agente_devops persistence, /miagente, /saldo, normal message no-crash), Call Center /turn (auth required, 413 oversize, 400 unknown agent, controlled 502 on invalid OPENAI key), extended branding GET/PUT with all v10 fields, /download/lluvia-deploy/info version v10-unified-promos-proposals-callcenter, and v9 endpoints (console agents=8, sessions CRUD, agency clients, agent-builder) all functioning.

minor.issue: When admin balance is enough the endpoint charges voz-in oros (cost_in) BEFORE calling Whisper; if Whisper later returns 401/invalid key the user is still debited. Suggested: refund on Whisper failure or charge only after Whisper success.

Handler updates db.branding with _id='default' but GET /api/branding reads {_id:'main'} (see branding.py). Approved branding_update proposals will NOT be reflected in GET /api/branding. RCA: mismatched collection key between proposals._apply_proposal and branding._get_branding_doc.

Whitelist of allowed branding keys in proposals._apply_proposal is {display,tagline,primary,accent,background,text_color,logo_url,product_name} but branding model uses primary_color/accent_color/background_color/logo_data_url/company_name/support_email. Approved branding proposals will drop most fields silently.

action_items: Fix branding_update proposal handler in /app/backend/proposals.py: use _id='main' (not 'default') and whitelist keys matching branding.py model (primary_color, accent_color, background_color, text_color, logo_data_url, product_name, tagline, company_name, support_email).
Consider refunding cost_in oros in /app/backend/call_center.py when Whisper raises (currently user is charged even on OpenAI 401).
(Out of preview scope) OPENAI_API_KEY in preview .env is invalid; voice/chat flows return 502 as expected. Real key only in VPS — confirmed handled correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: proposals._apply_proposal branding handler is inconsistent with branding module (wrong _id and wrong field whitelist) — silent data loss bug for that proposal type.
call_center.call_turn charges voz-in oros before Whisper success: no refund on failure.
telegram_unified.py: `if db is None` fix correctly applied for motor compatibility (no crash observed during /agente, /miagente, /saldo, /agente_devops).
rate_limit on /api/auth/login is per IP via x-forwarded-for header — works correctly under Kubernetes ingress (429 reproduced).
PayPal webhook correctly returns 403 when PAYPAL_WEBHOOK_ID env is missing (server logs confirm).
Hardcoded fallback URL in /api/command rate-limit test was avoided; production code uses env vars correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created temporary promos with TEST- prefix during tests; all cleaned up. No long-lived seed data left.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All v10 endpoints functional on preview. Two functional bugs found in proposals.branding_update handler (wrong collection _id key + wrong field whitelist). Once fixed, add a regression test: approve a branding_update proposal then GET /api/branding to verify tagline/primary_color persisted. The call-center 'charge before Whisper' is a minor UX bug worth fixing but not blocking. To re-run: `python -m pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_5_v10.py -v` (wait ~70s if you have already triggered rate-limit). Rate-limit test runs LAST intentionally because it depletes the 8/min login quota for the test IP.
rca of the issue: branding proposal bug: proposals._apply_proposal writes to {_id:'default'} with key names like 'primary'/'accent'/'logo_url', but branding._get_branding_doc reads from {_id:'main'} with key names like 'primary_color'/'accent_color'/'logo_data_url'. As a result, approved branding proposals silently do nothing visible. Mitigation: change `_id:'default'` -> `_id:'main'` and align the whitelist with branding.BrandingIn fields.
